## Summary

Describe the problem, the chosen behavior, and any compatibility or migration
impact.

## Verification

- [ ] Tests were added or updated for the behavior.
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes.
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` and `go vet ./...` pass, or the omission is explained.
- [ ] S3, FUSE, formal-model, and fault tests were run when relevant.
- [ ] Public API, protocol, security, and operational documentation is updated.
- [ ] New dependencies and licenses are recorded in the attribution inventory.
- [ ] No credentials, bearer URLs, customer data, or production diagnostics are included.
- [ ] Every commit carries a DCO `Signed-off-by` line.
